---
name: HubSpot Form Library
about: Build reusable intake forms across all websites
---

## Objective
Create reusable intake forms for lead capture across projects.

## Deliverables
- `group_booking_intake`
- `corporate_rate_request`
- `warbot_access_request`
- `creator_collaboration_intake`
- `client_project_intake`

## Shared hidden fields
- `website_domain`
- `lead_source=form`
- `lead_type`
- `source_campaign`

## Acceptance criteria
- [ ] All 5 forms created in HubSpot
- [ ] Form embed snippets documented for each domain
- [ ] Test submissions map to correct lead_type and domain
